name: AgentOps Efficiency Budgets Canary
description: Offline public canary for eval runtime budget visibility, fast coverage reporting, and conditional pre-push eval gating.

cases.title: coverage command completes under budget and reports all dimensions
cases.objective: Ensure product-wide eval coverage can be measured quickly enough for evolve and local gate feedback loops.

inputs.shell: tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; timeout 60s bash -lc 'cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go run ./cmd/ao eval coverage --root ../evals/agentops-core --json' > "$tmp/coverage.json"; python3 -c 'import json, sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["suite_count"] >= 11; assert "efficiency" in data.get("required_dimensions", []); assert not data.get("missing_required_dimensions")' "$tmp/coverage.json"

cases.title: pre-push gate runs eval canaries only for relevant changes
cases.objective: Keep local eval validation fast by only running public canaries when eval-related surfaces changed.

cases.title: testing docs publish eval canary runtime budget
cases.objective: Keep the expected public eval runtime visible to operators.

expectations.value: Run it when changing eval contracts

cases.title: eval contract defines efficiency as a score dimension
cases.objective: Protect the canonical definition that eval runs score time, budget, retry, and output limits.

expectations.value: `efficiency` | The run stayed within expected time, budget, retry, and output limits.
